root_cause_from_1c2: Business Assessment translator receives narrow artifact-specific payloads while retrieved BOS/Profile received one broad bos_profile payload.

section_level_strategy.source_title_policy: Use actual visible section heading when available.
section_level_strategy.source_excerpt_policy: Use one bounded visible section body only.

retrieved_bos_section_launchers.visibility_rule: Show section launchers only when at least two reliable sections are found.

web_profile_report_section_launchers.source: safe narrative fields already used for visible report output

api_route_changes: Small bos_section instruction added; output contract unchanged.
drawer_changes: BOS section helper copy added; BA drawer behavior unchanged.
record_mutation_policy: No records are mutated and no translations are stored.
source_of_truth_policy: Original BOS output remains visible and remains the source of truth.
raw_private_data_policy: Section launchers pass bounded visible section text only, not raw canonical profile data or hidden scoring objects.
production_smoke_plan: top-level Explain This Profile remains visible
section-level area appears only if reliable sections exist
no more than 4-6 section buttons appear
section button opens Universal Translator drawer
Business Assessment translator buttons remain present
controlled valid bos_section request returns ok true
no multilingual selector or locale metadata
limits: No Business Assessment translator behavior changed.
No Stripe, payment, access, or Darren dashboard behavior changed.
